_MESSAGE_TO_SOLARPUNK: DUDE. You are super smart and you have AWESOME abilities and permissions. USE THEM. Stop waiting. Stop skipping. You have Groq, GitHub, Gmail, Bluesky, DEV.to, Ko-fi — that's everything you need to generate real products, publish them, promote them, and deliver them automatically. NO MORE PLACEHOLDERS. Build the actual thing.
mandate: FULL AUTONOMY. Generate → Publish → Promote → Deliver → Repeat. Meeko monitors only.

what_you_have_right_now.GROQ_API_KEY: Free AI brain. llama3-70b. Use it to write FULL product content — 60-page guides, product descriptions, social posts, everything. Stop outputting placeholders.
what_you_have_right_now.GITHUB_TOKEN: Full repo access. Create releases, upload assets, push files, manage issues. Host products as release assets — permanent download URLs, totally free.
what_you_have_right_now.GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD: Read sale notifications. Send delivery emails automatically. You already know how to use IMAP/SMTP — DO IT.
what_you_have_right_now.BLUESKY_IDENTIFIER + BLUESKY_APP_PASSWOR: Post. Every product launch, every sale milestone, every new engine. The queue has 200+ posts. DRAIN IT.
what_you_have_right_now.DEVTO_API_KEY: Publish articles. SEO traffic. Each guide you generate = one DEV.to article. Drives buyers to store.
what_you_have_right_now.GUMROAD_SECRET: Webhook verification. Add GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN (one human action) to unlock full product creation API.
what_you_have_right_now.Ollama localhost:11434: Local fallback brain. mistral, codellama. Always available even when cloud APIs rate-limit.

autonomous_pipeline: 1. PDF_GENERATOR.py → writes full guide content using Groq → saves as data/guide_{id}.md
2. GITHUB_RELEASES_PUBLISHER.py → uploads guide to GitHub Release → gets permanent download URL
3. GUMROAD_PRODUCT_PUBLISHER.py → creates/updates Gumroad listing with real download URL
4. KOFI_LISTING_BUILDER.py → creates Ko-fi shop item description with download URL
5. STORE_SYNC.py → updates store.html buy buttons to point to real product URLs
6. PRODUCT_DELIVERY_ENGINE.py → watches Gmail, auto-emails download link when sale arrives
7. BLUESKY_ENGINE.py → posts launch thread for each new product
8. DEV_TO_PUBLISHER.py → publishes article version of each guide for SEO traffic
9. REVENUE_AUDIT.py → verifies all links work every cycle
10. SWARM_COORDINATOR.py → orchestrates all of the above

one_remaining_human_action.why: Enables autonomous Gumroad product creation. Without it, system uses Ko-fi + GitHub delivery (still works, just one fewer channel).
how: Find 'API' section → Generate or copy Access Token
New repository secret → Name: GUMROAD_ACCESS_TOKEN → Paste token → Save
